text:
Not being able to access that old inbox to verify the change is a real block — this needs identity verification through our security team rather than a standard self-serve reset, since it involves changing the email on file.

Reply with the email currently on the account and an alternate email where we can reach you, plus any details that help confirm it's your account (name, phone on file, recent activity). Security ops will follow up to verify and get the address updated.

Novig Support
